entity: 2014-15 Atlanta Hawks regular-season record 60-22 (1-seed in East, best Hawks season since 1993-94; Mike Budenholzer Coach of the Year)
notes: Warehouse row matches BBR (60-22, 1st in East/Southeast). The Hawks' 60-22 was a 26-game improvement over the prior season (36-46) and tied the 2nd-largest single-season turnaround in NBA history at the time.
